title: tanacetopsis eriobasis
intro: Tanacetopsis eriobasis, also known as the Arctic tansy or woolly tansy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal agent. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Tanacetopsis eriobasis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
